Bash(python -c "import csv;r=list\(csv.reader\(open\('test-cases_csms-001-welcome-line.csv',encoding='utf-8'\)\)\);print\('header cols:',len\(r[0]\)\);print\('data rows:',len\(r\)-1\);import collections;bad=[i for i,row in enumerate\(r\) if len\(row\)!=len\(r[0]\)];print\('malformed rows:',bad\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('test-data_csms-001-welcome-line.json','utf8'\)\);const cats=Object.fromEntries\(Object.entries\(d\).filter\(\([k,v]\)=>Array.isArray\(v\)\).map\(\([k,v]\)=>[k,v.length]\)\);console.log\('JSON OK',cats\);const all=Object.values\(d\).filter\(Array.isArray\).flat\(\);console.log\('total records',all.length\);console.log\('records missing tc_id/req_id:',all.filter\(r=>!r.tc_id||!r.req_id\).length\);const lines=fs.readFileSync\('test-cases_csms-001-welcome-line.csv','utf8'\).trim\(\).split\(/\\r?\\n/\);console.log\('CSV lines\(incl header\):',lines.length,'-> data rows:',lines.length-1\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./test-data_csms-004-birthday.json'\); const cats=['positive','negative','boundary','business_rule','e2e','risk_based']; let n=0; cats.forEach\(c=>{n+=d[c].length}\); console.log\('JSON valid. total records:', n\); cats.forEach\(c=>console.log\(c, d[c].length\)\); const bad=[]; cats.forEach\(c=>d[c].forEach\(r=>{if\(!r.tc_id||!r.req_id\)bad.push\(r.id\)}\)\); console.log\('records missing tc/req:', bad.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./test-data_csms-002-welcome-round2.json'\);const cats=['positive','negative','boundary','business_rule','e2e','risk_based'];let n=0;for\(const c of cats\){n+=d[c].length;for\(const r of d[c]\){if\(!r.tc_id||!r.req_id\){console.log\('MISSING bind',r.id\)}}}console.log\('JSON OK; total records',n\);console.log\(Object.fromEntries\(cats.map\(c=>[c,d[c].length]\)\)\)")
